translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ according to the commandment of God our Savior and the Lord Jesus Christ  our hope;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to Timothy, my true child in faith: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As I urged you when I was going into Macedonia, stay at Ephesus that you might command certain men not to teach a different doctrine,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and not to pay attention to myths and endless genealogies, which cause disputes, rather than God’s stewardship, which is in faith —

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but the goal of this command is love, out of a pure heart and a good conscience and sincere faith;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: from which things some, having missed the mark, have turned aside to vain talking;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: desiring to be teachers of the law, though they understand neither what they say, nor about what they strongly affirm.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But we know that the law is good, if a person uses it lawfully,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: as knowing this, that law is not made for a righteous person, but for the lawless and insubordinate, for the ungodly and sinners, for the unholy and profane, for murderers of fathers and murderers of mothers, for manslayers,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for the sexually immoral, for homosexuals, for slave-traders, for liars, for perjurers, and for any other thing contrary to the sound doctrine;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: according to the Good News of the glory of the blessed God, which was committed to my trust.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And I thank him who enabled me, Christ Jesus our Lord, because he counted me faithful, appointing me to service;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: although I was before a blasphemer, a persecutor, and insolent. However, I obtained mercy, because I did it ignorantly in unbelief.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The grace of our Lord abounded exceedingly with faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance, that Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners; of whom I am chief.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: However, for this cause I obtained mercy, that in me first, Jesus Christ might display all his patience, for an example of those who were going to believe in him for eternal life.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now to the King eternal, immortal, invisible, to God who alone is wise, be honor and glory forever and ever. Amen.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This instruction I commit to you, my child Timothy, according to the prophecies which led the way to you, that by them you may wage the good warfare;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: holding faith and a good conscience; which some having thrust away made a shipwreck concerning the faith;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: of whom is Hymenaeus and Alexander; whom I delivered to Satan, that they might be taught not to blaspheme.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I exhort therefore, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercessions, and givings of thanks, be made for all men:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for kings and all who are in high places; that we may lead a tranquil and quiet life in all godliness and reverence.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For this is good and acceptable in the sight of God our Savior;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who desires all people to be saved and come to full knowledge of the truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For there is one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who gave himself as a ransom for all; the testimony in its own times;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to which I was appointed a preacher and an apostle (I am telling the truth in Christ, not lying), a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I desire therefore that the men in every place pray, lifting up holy hands without anger and doubting.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the same way, that women also adorn themselves in decent clothing, with modesty and propriety; not just  with braided hair, gold, pearls, or expensive clothing;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but (which becomes women professing godliness) with good works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let a woman learn in quietness with full submission.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I don’t permit a woman to teach, nor to exercise authority over a man, but to be in quietness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Adam was first formed, then Eve.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Adam wasn’t deceived, but the woman, being deceived, has fallen into disobedience;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but she will be saved through her childbearing, if they continue in faith, love, and sanctification with sobriety.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is a faithful saying: if a man seeks the office of an overseer,  he desires a good work.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The overseer therefore must be without reproach, the husband of one wife, temperate, sensible, modest, hospitable, good at teaching;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: not a drinker, not violent, not greedy for money, but gentle, not quarrelsome, not covetous;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: one who rules his own house well, having children in subjection with all reverence;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: (but if a man doesn’t know how to rule his own house, how will he take care of the assembly of God?)

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: not a new convert, lest being puffed up he fall into the same condemnation as the devil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Moreover he must have good testimony from those who are outside, to avoid falling into reproach and the snare of the devil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Servants,  in the same way, must be reverent, not double-tongued, not addicted to much wine, not greedy for money;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them also first be tested; then let them serve  if they are blameless.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their wives in the same way must be reverent, not slanderers, temperate, faithful in all things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let servants  be husbands of one wife, ruling their children and their own houses well.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For those who have served well  gain for themselves a good standing, and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: These things I write to you, hoping to come to you shortly;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but if I wait long, that you may know how men ought to behave themselves in God’s house, which is the assembly of the living God, the pillar and ground of the truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Without controversy, the mystery of godliness is great: God  was revealed in the flesh, justified in the spirit, seen by angels, preached among the nations, believed on in the world, and received up in glory.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But the Spirit says expressly that in later times some will fall away from the faith, paying attention to seducing spirits and doctrines of demons,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: through the hypocrisy of men who speak lies, branded in their own conscience as with a hot iron;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: forbidding marriage and commanding to abstain from foods which God created to be received with thanksgiving by those who believe and know the truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For every creature of God is good, and nothing is to be rejected, if it is received with thanksgiving.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For it is sanctified through the word of God and prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If you instruct the brothers of these things, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus, nourished in the words of the faith, and of the good doctrine which you have followed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But refuse profane and old wives’ fables. Exercise yourself toward godliness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For bodily exercise has some value, but godliness has value in all things, having the promise of the life which is now, and of that which is to come.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For to this end we both labor and suffer reproach, because we have set our trust in the living God, who is the Savior of all men, especially of those who believe.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Command and teach these things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let no man despise your youth; but be an example to those who believe, in word, in your way of life, in love, in spirit, in faith, and in purity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Until I come, pay attention to reading, to exhortation, and to teaching.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t neglect the gift that is in you, which was given to you by prophecy, with the laying on of the hands of the elders.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be diligent in these things. Give yourself wholly to them, that your progress may be revealed to all.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pay attention to yourself, and to your teaching. Continue in these things, for in doing this you will save both yourself and those who hear you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t rebuke an older man, but exhort him as a father; the younger men as brothers;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: the elder women as mothers; the younger as sisters, in all purity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Honor widows who are widows indeed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But if any widow has children or grandchildren, let them learn first to show piety towards their own family, and to repay their parents, for this is  acceptable in the sight of God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now she who is a widow indeed, and desolate, has her hope set on God, and continues in petitions and prayers night and day.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But she who gives herself to pleasure is dead while she lives.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Also command these things, that they may be without reproach.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But if anyone doesn’t provide for his own, and especially his own household, he has denied the faith, and is worse than an unbeliever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let no one be enrolled as a widow under sixty years old, having been the wife of one man,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: being approved by good works, if she has brought up children, if she has been hospitable to strangers, if she has washed the saints’ feet, if she has relieved the afflicted, and if she has diligently followed every good work.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But refuse younger widows, for when they have grown wanton against Christ, they desire to marry;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having condemnation, because they have rejected their first pledge.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Besides, they also learn to be idle, going about from house to house. Not only idle, but also gossips and busybodies, saying things which they ought not.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I desire therefore that the younger widows marry, bear children, rule the household, and give no occasion to the adversary for insulting.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For already some have turned aside after Satan.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If any man or woman who believes has widows, let them relieve them, and don’t let the assembly be burdened; that it might relieve those who are widows indeed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the elders who rule well be counted worthy of double honor, especially those who labor in the word and in teaching.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Scripture says, “You shall not muzzle the ox when it treads out the grain.”  And, “The laborer is worthy of his wages.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t receive an accusation against an elder, except at the word of two or three witnesses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who sin, reprove in the sight of all, that the rest also may be in fear.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I command you in the sight of God, and Christ Jesus, and the chosen angels, that you observe these things without prejudice, doing nothing by partiality.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lay hands hastily on no one, neither be a participant in other men’s sins. Keep yourself pure.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be no longer a drinker of water only, but use a little wine for your stomach’s sake and your frequent infirmities.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Some men’s sins are evident, preceding them to judgment, and some also follow later.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the same way also there are good works that are obvious, and those that are otherwise can’t be hidden.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let as many as are bondservants under the yoke count their own masters worthy of all honor, that the name of God and the doctrine not be blasphemed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who have believing masters, let them not despise them, because they are brothers, but rather let them serve them, because those who partake of the benefit are believing and beloved. Teach and exhort these things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If anyone teaches a different doctrine, and doesn’t consent to sound words, the words of our Lord Jesus Christ, and to the doctrine which is according to godliness,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: he is conceited, knowing nothing, but obsessed with arguments, disputes, and word battles, from which come envy, strife, insulting, evil suspicions,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: constant friction of people of corrupt minds and destitute of the truth, who suppose that godliness is a means of gain. Withdraw yourself from such.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But godliness with contentment is great gain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For we brought nothing into the world, and we certainly can’t carry anything out.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But having food and clothing, we will be content with that.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But those who are determined to be rich fall into a temptation and a snare and many foolish and harmful lusts, such as drown men in ruin and destruction.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the love of money is a root of all kinds of evil. Some have been led astray from the faith in their greed, and have pierced themselves through with many sorrows.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you, man of God, flee these things, and follow after righteousness, godliness, faith, love, perseverance, and gentleness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Fight the good fight of faith. Take hold of the eternal life to which you were called, and you confessed the good confession in the sight of many witnesses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I command you before God, who gives life to all things, and before Christ Jesus, who before Pontius Pilate testified the good confession,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that you keep the commandment without spot, blameless, until the appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: which in its own times he will show, who is the blessed and only Ruler, the King of kings, and Lord of lords;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who alone has immortality, dwelling in unapproachable light; whom no man has seen, nor can see: to whom be honor and eternal power. Amen.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Charge those who are rich in this present world that they not be haughty, nor have their hope set on the uncertainty of riches, but on the living God, who richly provides us with everything to enjoy;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that they do good, that they be rich in good works, that they be ready to distribute, willing to communicate;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: laying up in store for themselves a good foundation against the time to come, that they may lay hold of eternal life.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Timothy, guard that which is committed to you, turning away from the empty chatter and oppositions of what is falsely called knowledge;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: which some profess, and thus have wandered from the faith. Grace be with you. Amen.
